options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Pick a Goal to finish the game.
Hell Castle is the usual finish of the game, being the last stage to beat.
Volcano and Mountaintop are boss rush stages and are therefore regarded has more difficult stages than Hell Castle.

options.name: ranger_class_randomizer
options.description:
When enabled, start with the Class selected in Class Selector, and unlock other Classes via checks.
This also starts you off with the Forget Tree, to switch Classes, and Forget is free.

options.name: ranger_class_selected
options.description: Selects the Class you start with when Class Randomizer is enabled.

options.name: classes_req_for_castle
options.description:
Minimum number of additional Ranger Classes you must unlock before entering the Castle stage.
Applies only when Class Randomizer is enabled (your starting class is not counted here).

options.name: classes_req_for_submarine_shrine
options.description:
Minimum number of additional Ranger Classes you must unlock before entering the Submarine Shrine stage.
Applies only when Class Randomizer is enabled (your starting class is not counted here).

options.name: classes_req_for_pyramid
options.description:
Minimum number of additional Ranger Classes you must unlock before entering the Pyramid stage.
Applies only when Class Randomizer is enabled (your starting class is not counted here).

options.name: classes_req_for_ice_castle
options.description:
Minimum number of additional Ranger Classes you must unlock before entering the Ice Castle stage.
Applies only when Class Randomizer is enabled (your starting class is not counted here).

options.name: classes_req_for_hell_castle
options.description:
Minimum number of additional Ranger Classes you must unlock before entering the Hell Castle stage.
Applies only when Class Randomizer is enabled (your starting class is not counted here).

options.name: min_stages_req_for_castle
options.display_name: Minimum number of required pre-Castle stages
options.description:
Minimum number of pre-Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Castle stage.
Pre-Castle stages are: Grassland 1-7, Lake, Hill Country 1-3, Forest 1&2, Cavern 1-3 and Castle Gate.

options.name: max_stages_req_for_castle
options.display_name: Maximum number of required pre-Castle stages
options.description:
Maximum number of pre-Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Castle stage.
Pre-Castle stages are: Grassland 1-7, Lake, Hill Country 1-3, Forest 1&2, Cavern 1-3 and Castle Gate.

options.name: stages_req_for_castle
options.display_name: Actual number of required pre-Castle stages
options.description:
Actual number of required pre-Castle stages to beat.
Only used for rules and tracking.

options.name: min_stages_req_for_submarine_shrine
options.display_name: Minimum number of required pre-Submarine Shrine stages
options.description:
Minimum number of pre-Submarine Shrine stages you must unlock before entering the Submarine Shrine stage.
Pre-Submarine Shrine stages are: Seaside 1-4, Submarine 1-4, Mist Grove 1-3 and ???.

options.name: max_stages_req_for_submarine_shrine
options.display_name: Maximum number of required pre-Submarine Shrine stages
options.description:
Maximum number of pre-Submarine Shrine stages you must unlock before entering the Submarine Shrine stage.
Pre-Submarine Shrine stages are: Seaside 1-4, Submarine 1-4, Mist Grove 1-3 and ???.

options.name: stages_req_for_submarine_shrine
options.display_name: Actual number of required pre-Submarine Shrine stages
options.description:
Actual number of required pre-Submarine Shrine stages to beat.
Only used for rules and tracking.

options.name: min_stages_req_for_pyramid
options.display_name: Minimum number of required pre-Pyramid stages
options.description:
Minimum number of pre-Pyramid stages you must unlock before entering the Pyramid stage.
Pre-Pyramid stages are: Desert 1-8, Oasis and Beach 1-3.

options.name: max_stages_req_for_pyramid
options.display_name: Maximum number of required pre-Pyramid stages
options.description:
Maximum number of pre-Pyramid stages you must unlock before entering the Pyramid stage.
Pre-Pyramid stages are: Desert 1-8, Oasis and Beach 1-3.

options.name: stages_req_for_pyramid
options.display_name: Actual number of required pre-Pyramid stages
options.description:
Actual number of required pre-Pyramid stages to beat.
Only used for rules and tracking.

options.name: min_stages_req_for_ice_castle
options.display_name: Minimum number of required pre-Ice Castle stages
options.description:
Minimum number of pre-Ice Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Ice Castle stage.
Pre-Ice Castle stages are: Cavern 4-6, Snowfield 1-8, Mountain 1&2 and Frozen Lake.

options.name: max_stages_req_for_ice_castle
options.display_name: Maximum number of required pre-Ice Castle stages
options.description:
Maximum number of pre-Ice Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Ice Castle stage.
Pre-Ice Castle stages are: Cavern 4-6, Snowfield 1-8, Mountain 1&2 and Frozen Lake.

options.name: stages_req_for_ice_castle
options.display_name: Actual number of required pre-Ice Castle stages
options.description:
Actual number of required pre-Ice Castle stages to beat.
Only used for rules and tracking.

options.name: min_stages_req_for_hell_castle
options.display_name: Minimum number of required pre-Hell Castle stages
options.description:
Minimum number of pre-Hell Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Hell Castle stage.
Pre-Hell Castle stages are: Snowfield 9, Beach 4, Forest 3-6, !!!, Hell 1-8, Inferno 1-3, Blood Lake, Cavern 7&8 and Hell Gate.

options.name: max_stages_req_for_hell_castle
options.display_name: Maximum number of required pre-Hell Castle stages
options.description:
Maximum number of pre-Hell Castle stages you must unlock before entering the Hell Castle stage.
Pre-Hell Castle stages are: Snowfield 9, Beach 4, Forest 3-6, !!!, Hell 1-8, Inferno 1-3, Blood Lake, Cavern 7&8 and Hell Gate.

options.name: stages_req_for_hell_castle
options.display_name: Actual number of required pre-HellCastle stages
options.description:
Actual number of required pre-Hell Castle stages to beat.
Only used for rules and tracking.

options.name: shuffle_books
options.description:
Controls whether buying Books are checks.
Either Shuffle Books or Shuffle Enemies needs to be turned on.

options.name: shuffle_enemies
options.description:
Controls whether enemies drop a check.
Either Shuffle Enemies or Shuffle Books needs to be turned on.

common enemies: Every non-boss enemy has a 5% chance to drop.
boss enemies:   Every boss enemy has a 25% chance to drop.
both:           Both settings are on.

options.name: gold_multiplier
options.description: Multiplies the gold dropped by enemies.

options.name: xp_multiplier
options.description: Multiplies the XP gained per enemy killed.

options.name: drop_multiplier
options.description: Multiplies the chance of enemies dropping an item.

options.name: shop_hints
options.description: When enabled, the Book shop will show you what you are buying and it will send out hints for buyable Books.

options.name: randomize_book_costs
options.description:
Randomizes the costs of Books.

vanilla:                  Costs are vanilla (1000*stage number).
random_balanced:          Costs are randomized, but still balanced.
random_extreme:           Costs can range between 1-99999.
random_extreme_expensive: Costs can range between 1-999999. (Not recommended)

options.name: traps
options.description: Configure if and how many Trap items there are, replacing filler items.

options.name: remove_null_compo
options.description: When enabled, buying weapons from the shop removes the 'cross' compo from the second compo slot

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
